THE_DELIBERATE_EMPTINESS_OF_THIS_FILE.statement: This file is empty of traction because there is none, and that emptiness is a deliberate act of integrity, not an oversight.
THE_DELIBERATE_EMPTINESS_OF_THIS_FILE.the_temptation_being_resisted: It would be trivial to populate this file with invented pilot agreements, fabricated letters of intent, imaginary customer counts, or a 'we are in discussions with' list that overstates a single polite email. Many pitch decks do exactly this.
THE_DELIBERATE_EMPTINESS_OF_THIS_FILE.why_we_refuse: A pitch that invents traction is fraud, and it is the specific kind of fraud that diligence is designed to catch. A single fabricated LOI that an investor calls to verify ends the raise and the reputation. A pitch that shows honest zeros against a rigorous plan survives diligence and builds the trust that the unverifiable later claims depend on. See funding-ask.json#/the_counterintuitive_bet.
THE_DELIBERATE_EMPTINESS_OF_THIS_FILE.the_principle: Fill this file only from reality. Every field below is a real category of traction, currently and honestly at zero or 'not started'. When real traction arrives, it goes here, dated and verifiable.

current_status.overall: Pre-seed / concept. TRL 3. No product, no pilot, no revenue, no team hired.
what_actually_exists: A clearly specified concept and an industrial design render.
A system architecture and requirements baseline.

traction_categories.note: All zero/not-started. Structured so real evidence slots in cleanly and dishonest padding has an obvious empty home rather than a tempting blank.

team.status: see team-structure.json — roles specified, none filled

partnerships.regulatory_engagement: none — CAAP conversation is a Phase 0 priority

intellectual_property.status: none — and the honest position is that the winch/calibration engineering is hard but not patent-hard; the real moat is data and relationships, neither of which exists yet

the_milestones_that_will_constitute_real.note: What to put here as it actually happens. Each is a genuine de-risking event, ordered by the risk it removes.
in_order: Phase 0: 25+ documented farmer interviews with a written synthesis — including operators who said no and why.
Phase 0: a signed academic validation MOU.
Phase 0: a documented BVLOS pathway from CAAP engagement.
Phase 2: profile-vs-reference-sonde agreement demonstrated — the moment the core claim becomes true.
Phase 3: a full-season validation dataset, peer-reviewed by the academic partner.
Phase 3: a documented case of a warning leading to a useful intervention.
Phase 4: the first paying customer with renewal intent.
the_milestones_that_will_constitute_real.the_most_important_one: The profile-vs-reference-sonde agreement (Phase 2). Everything before it is preparation; everything after it is building on a proven core. It is the single traction milestone that most changes the company's fundability, because it converts the central technical claim from 'plausible' to 'demonstrated'.

how_to_present_no_traction.the_pitch: 'We have no traction, and here is why that is the honest and correct state for a company at this stage: we have deliberately not spent on hardware before proving the concept can be built and that farmers will pay. Here is the small, cheap first phase that produces our first real traction — 25 farmer interviews, a validation MOU, and the payload arithmetic — and here are the kill criteria under which we would stop. Fund that, and watch us produce evidence.'
how_to_present_no_traction.why_this_works: It reframes the absence of traction from a weakness into evidence of capital discipline. It is far stronger than a padded traction slide, and it is true. The investors who reject it in favour of a company with fabricated LOIs are selecting for dishonesty, and they are not the investors this company wants.
